calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Alexandra Odowd

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is present represented by Johnathan Vaknbin
Defendant Alexandra Odowd is not present.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Alexandra Odowd.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Alexandra Odowd as follows:

Damages/Principal: $12,091.81
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $460.00
Total Judgment: $12,551.81

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions As Admitted; Declaration Of David Bartley, Esq.; Notice Of Lodging Of Proposed Order; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA's Motion For Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions As Admitted.

Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
